rounds: Two weeks of holding the line on routine — that's not nothing, that's actually the floor staying solid. But the Apollo ring moment? Colleague asks, you've got a half-naked man on your finger, and you folded. That one went to the Joy Police.
pattern: They're letting the visible stuff exist, then swooping in the second someone notices it.
focus: One conversation, any conversation, where you let the ring mean something out loud.
